channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Grass cutting, 26th March
item.description:
Would just like to say I requested the grass to be cut in Chieveley road. They came yesterday and have done a really good job!! They deserve a really big thankyou👍well done!!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chieveley Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Top Hazelmwre corner Kenilworth priory park, 26th March
item.description:
Rubbish everywhere

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glengall Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Metal contraption, 26th March
item.description:
This was reported on 23/01/26. It is still not been removed. It is taking up parking space. Told it was passed to grab lorry. But it's been over 2 months. I feel it's not worth reporting any issues.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Hicks Street, Deptford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Top Hazelmere corner Kenilworth priory park, 26th March
item.description:
Mattress

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hazelmere Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Urine and feces in comunal stairs leading to appartment, 26th March
item.description:
The entire stairs area is scattered with animal waste and Urine. The area has not been cleaned for over two weeks despite having scheduled biweekly cleaning service

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 116, Sedgmoor Place, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement disintegrating on Mottingham Road close to speed camera, 26th March
item.description:
The pavement has been breaking up for some time
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mottingham Road, Coldharbour, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on pavement, 26th March
item.description:
A fridge freezer has been dumped on the pavement at the entrance to the back alley of the shops also a toilet has been dumped
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gwillim Close, Blackfen, Greater London

Part of a fa chairs and rubbish bags in street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodvale Avenue, South Norwood, Greater London

item.title: Tree branches causing damage to car and drive way, 26th March
item.description:
Tree branches falling on top of the car and into driveway . This has caused sun roof glass to break in the car & had to replace . Can this tree to be pruned asap and also regularly. We have children in the house and concerned if this might also drop on them.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Hill, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 165, 26th March
item.description:
Temporary plastic cover is defective (cracked). Also, a trip hazard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 165-171, Iverson Road, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Road, London

item.title: Dead fox found by the sidewalk, 26th March
item.description:

item.title: Blocked gully drain, 26th March
item.description:
The gully drain outside 24 is blocked and you can see water near the top this needs attention otherwise it will eventually flood the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Merewood Road, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
